title: Menubar live refresh — watch sessions.json changes instead of polling
description:
Replace polling-based menu bar refresh with file watching so the panel updates immediately when sessions change without stale counts or unnecessary churn.

Acceptance criteria:
- the menu bar app reacts to sessions.json changes without a fixed poll timer
- open panel state updates cleanly while the popover is visible
- refresh logic is resilient to temporary file replacement during atomic writes
- CPU wakeups are lower than the current polling model

context.text: DispatchSource file watch on ~/.simemu/ dir. 200ms debounce, 30s fallback. Popover updates live. Built and verified running. Wave 2 complete.

acceptanceCriteria: menu bar reacts to sessions.json changes without polling
open panel state updates while visible
file-watch logic tolerates atomic replace writes
